demoapp_notif.30_days_before_pause_message: Your subscription pauses in 30 days. Features will be unavailable. Let's plan your next move.
demoapp_notif.7_days_before_pause_message: Just to let you know, your plan will be going into pause mode in just 7 days. Plan ahead to make the most of it.
demoapp_notif.1_day_before_pause_message: Just a heads-up, your subscription pauses tomorrow. We're here if you need any support.
demoapp_notif.now_on_pause_title: Your plan is now on pause
demoapp_notif.now_on_pause_message: Take a breather, this gives you more time to plan your success. Hope to see you back soon.
demoapp_notif.subscription_resumed_title: Great, subscription is back on track
demoapp_notif.subscription_resumed_message: Your subscription has been successfully resumed. It's excited to continue this journey with you.
demoapp_notif.MADP-3474: [OneMobile Preview App] - Analytics Notification - Product Engagement
demoapp_notif.push_total_sales_message: Your sales have been impressive this past week, reaching {{total_sales}}. Explore what's working and keep it going! 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_total_orders_message: Good news! You've got {{number_orders}} new orders waiting in your app. Manage and fulfill them quickly to keep your customers happy.
demoapp_notif.push_app_installs_message: Yay! You've got new {{number_installs}} app installs in the last week. Growth looks good on you!
demoapp_notif.push_active_users_message: {{active_users}} new active users over the past week. Dive into user engagement metrics and bolster your retention strategies. 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_ratings_and_reviews_message: Amazing work! Make sure to respond the reviews and feedbacks to keep shining! 🎉
demoapp_notif.push_product_views_message: Your mobile app has drawn {{product_views}} new product views in the past 7 days. Consider some promotions to convert them into sales! 🛍️
demoapp_notif.push_product_sold_message: You've sold {{sold_numbers}} products in the previous week. How about restocking your bestsellers and planning your next sales strategy? 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_favorite_products_message: {{favourite_numbers}} items were added to the wishlist. Quick tip, stock up and maybe showcase those products a bit more? 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_product_shared_message: Your products have been shared {{shared_numbers}} times in the past week. How about a special discount code for customers to share even more? 🎁
demoapp_notif.push_most_viewed_message: Heads up! Your most viewed product this week is now {{product_title}}.Time to investigate why and adjust your marketing strategies accordingly! 🔍
demoapp_notif.push_top_selling_title: Who is top seller this weeek? 💰
demoapp_notif.push_top_selling_message: Take note! Your top-selling product for this week is now {{product_title}}. Capitalize on its popularity, ensure its stock levels and promote it more! 🥇
demoapp_notif.push_top_conversion_message: Notice! Your product with the highest conversion this week is now {{product_title}}. This is a fantastic opportunity to analyze the new front-runner and ramp up your related marketing efforts! 💪
demoapp_notif.push_most_favorited_message: Guess what? The most favorited product of this week is {{product_title}}. Consider spotlighting it in your next campaign to ride this wave of popularity! 🌟
demoapp_notif.push_top_sharing_message: Your top-shared product this week is now {{product_title}}. Leverage this trend and encourage more sharing with targeted marketing. Let's go viral! 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_mess: In the last week, your lost sales (abandoned carts) totalled {{abandoned_cart_value}}. Time to win them back!💰
demoapp_notif.push_average_order_value_message: Good news! The average order value (AOV) has increased compared to last week. Keep up the great work and continue focusing on strategies that boost AOV! 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_time_to_first_order_message: Great achievement! The time to first order has shortened compared to last week. Your efforts to convert customers quickly are working! 🏆
demoapp_notif.push_orders_by_traffic_sources_message: Our orders from traffic sources have increased this week. How about optimizing these sources further for more profitable results? 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_conversion_funnel_message: Customers are engaging more with your app. 🚀 Check out how the steps of your conversion funnel have increased compared to last week.
demoapp_notif.push_signed-up_users_message: Let's make them feel welcome with a warm welcome email or a special discount on their first purchase! 🎁
demoapp_notif.push_retention_message: This is the perfect time to reinforce relationships. Consider launching a loyalty program or offering exclusive deals to keep them coming back! 🎁
demoapp_notif.push_average_engagement_time_message: Users are spending more time in your app than last week. Time to double down on what's working and introduce more captivating content or features! 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_message: Good news! Session times from your traffic sources have increased.
demoapp_notif.push_average_session_number_message: Now's the time to dive deeper into these sources and fine-tune them for stellar user engagement! 🎯
demoapp_notif.push_sessions_by_devices_message: There's an uptake in {{number_sessions}} sessions through varied devices. Now is a good time to analyze which devices are more popular and streamline your app's performance.
demoapp_notif.push_customer_lifetime_value_message: Impressive! The lifetime value of your customer {{customer_lifetime_value}} has increased this week. Keep the momentum going💪
demoapp_notif.push_highest_active_hour_message: Perfect opportunity to evaluate the peak times for sending push notifications to enhance engagement. Don't miss this golden hour! ⏰
demoapp_notif.push_monthly_active_users_title: Monthly active users on the rise! 📈
demoapp_notif.push_monthly_active_users_message: It's an excellent time to keep your users engaged with personalized offers or rewards for their activity. Keep growing! 💪
demoapp_notif.push_average_order_frequency_message: Fantastic! Your average order frequency has increased compared to last month. You're doing great, consider running loyalty programs or repeat-purchase incentives to maintain this momentum! 💥
demoapp_notif.push_returning_customers_message: Well done! More returning customers this month. Consider VIP offers or special deals to reward their loyalty. Keep soaring! 👏

demoapp_analytics.installs_tooltip: The total number of downloads and installations of your mobile apps.

demoapp_analytics.metric_requires_integrations: This metric requires Google Analytics integration.
demoapp_analytics.monthly_active_users_description: The total active users who visited the app once per month within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.placeholder_ai_report: e.g., Show me weekly active users for Q1
demoapp_analytics.product_views_description: The total number of times customers visit the product details screens within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.products_sold_description: The total number of times customers buy products within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.retention_go_to_integration: This metric requires Google Analytics integration.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_abandoned_potential_sales: The estimated sales could have generated if customers had completed their purchases.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_average_order_frequency: The average number of times a customer places orders within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_average_order_value: The average amount of money customers spent on each order within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_average_session_length: The average time customers spent using your app within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_average_session_number: The average number of times a user opens and uses your apps within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_comparison: The increase or decrease in the amount compared to the previous period.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_conversion_funnel: Track customer journey, from session start to order placed within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_conversion_rate: The products that are most purchased by how often customers visit within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_currency_changed: Your recent store currency change may be impacting app analytics. You can reset your currency settings to restore accurate tracking.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_customer_lifetime_value: Total sales you can expect from a customer within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_favorited_products: The total product items that customers added to their wishlist within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_highest_active_hour: The total customer sessions by day and by hour (UTC-7) within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_new_app_sessions: The total count of new and returning sessions within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_order_by_sources: The breakdown of orders placed by where customers came from within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_products_shared: The total number of times your products are shared within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_ratings_reviews: The number of times that users have submitted ratings and reviews to App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android) within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_retention: The ratio of customer return sessions to new sessions within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_returning_customers: The percentage of customers who return to make another purchase after their initial purchase.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_sessions_by_devices: The total count of sessions breakdown by device types within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_sessions_by_traffic_sources: The total count of sessions breakdown by traffic sources within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_signed_up_users: Customers who signed up to create an account on your apps within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_table_items: The total number of product items sold within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_table_most_favorited: The total time customers added the product to their wishlist within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_table_rate_most_viewed: The percentage of product views compared to the total number of views.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_table_rate_shares: The percentage of times your product was shared compared to the total shares for all products.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_table_rate_top_selling: The percentage of product items sold compared to the total.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_table_shares: The total number of times your product is shared within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_table_views: The total number of times customers visit the product details screen within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.tooltip_time_to_first_order: The average time customers take from installing app to first order within the filter time range.
demoapp_analytics.total_orders_description: This is the total number of orders made across your apps via OneMobile.
demoapp_analytics.total_revenues_description: The total revenue generated by your apps through OneMobile.

demoapp_notif.permission_notification_desc: Turn on notifications and never miss important updates, offers, or sales news from OneMobile:
demoapp_notif.push_abandoned_cart_potential_sales_mess: In the last week, your lost sales (abandoned carts) totalled {{abandoned_cart_value}}. Time to win them back!💰
demoapp_notif.push_active_users_message: {{active_users}} new active users over the past week. Dive into user engagement metrics and bolster your retention strategies. 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_app_installs_message: Yay! You've got new {{number_installs}} app installs in the last week. Growth looks good on you!
demoapp_notif.push_average_engagement_time_message: Users are spending more time in your app than last week. Time to double down on what's working and introduce more captivating content or features! 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_average_order_frequency_message: Fantastic! Your average order frequency has increased compared to last month. You're doing great, consider running loyalty programs or repeat-purchase incentives to maintain this momentum! 💥
demoapp_notif.push_average_order_value_message: Good news! The average order value (AOV) has increased compared to last week. Keep up the great work and continue focusing on strategies that boost AOV! 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_average_session_number_message: Now's the time to dive deeper into these sources and fine-tune them for stellar user engagement! 🎯
demoapp_notif.push_conversion_funnel_message: Customers are engaging more with your app. 🚀 Check out how the steps of your conversion funnel have increased compared to last week.
demoapp_notif.push_customer_lifetime_value_message: Impressive! The lifetime value of your customer {{customer_lifetime_value}} has increased this week. Keep the momentum going💪
demoapp_notif.push_favorite_products_message: {{favourite_numbers}} items were added to the wishlist. Quick tip, stock up and maybe showcase those products a bit more? 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_highest_active_hour_message: Perfect opportunity to evaluate the peak times for sending push notifications to enhance engagement. Don't miss this golden hour! ⏰
demoapp_notif.push_monthly_active_users_message: It's an excellent time to keep your users engaged with personalized offers or rewards for their activity. Keep growing! 💪
demoapp_notif.push_monthly_active_users_title: Monthly active users on the rise! 📈
demoapp_notif.push_most_favorited_message: Guess what? The most favorited product of this week is {{product_title}}. Consider spotlighting it in your next campaign to ride this wave of popularity! 🌟
demoapp_notif.push_most_viewed_message: Heads up! Your most viewed product this week is now {{product_title}}.Time to investigate why and adjust your marketing strategies accordingly! 🔍
demoapp_notif.push_orders_by_traffic_sources_message: Our orders from traffic sources have increased this week. How about optimizing these sources further for more profitable results? 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_product_shared_message: Your products have been shared {{shared_numbers}} times in the past week. How about a special discount code for customers to share even more? 🎁
demoapp_notif.push_product_sold_message: You've sold {{sold_numbers}} products in the previous week. How about restocking your bestsellers and planning your next sales strategy? 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_product_views_message: Your mobile app has drawn {{product_views}} new product views in the past 7 days. Consider some promotions to convert them into sales! 🛍️
demoapp_notif.push_ratings_and_reviews_message: Amazing work! Make sure to respond the reviews and feedbacks to keep shining! 🎉
demoapp_notif.push_retention_message: This is the perfect time to reinforce relationships. Consider launching a loyalty program or offering exclusive deals to keep them coming back! 🎁
demoapp_notif.push_returning_customers_message: Well done! More returning customers this month. Consider VIP offers or special deals to reward their loyalty. Keep soaring! 👏
demoapp_notif.push_sessions_by_devices_message: There's an uptake in {{number_sessions}} sessions through varied devices. Now is a good time to analyze which devices are more popular and streamline your app's performance.
demoapp_notif.push_sessions_by_traffic_sources_message: Good news! Session times from your traffic sources have increased.
demoapp_notif.push_signed-up_users_message: Let's make them feel welcome with a warm welcome email or a special discount on their first purchase! 🎁
demoapp_notif.push_time_to_first_order_message: Great achievement! The time to first order has shortened compared to last week. Your efforts to convert customers quickly are working! 🏆
demoapp_notif.push_top_conversion_message: Notice! Your product with the highest conversion this week is now {{product_title}}. This is a fantastic opportunity to analyze the new front-runner and ramp up your related marketing efforts! 💪
demoapp_notif.push_top_selling_message: Take note! Your top-selling product for this week is now {{product_title}}. Capitalize on its popularity, ensure its stock levels and promote it more! 🥇
demoapp_notif.push_top_selling_title: Who is top seller this weeek? 💰
demoapp_notif.push_top_sharing_message: Your top-shared product this week is now {{product_title}}. Leverage this trend and encourage more sharing with targeted marketing. Let's go viral! 🚀
demoapp_notif.push_total_orders_message: Good news! You've got {{number_orders}} new orders waiting in your app. Manage and fulfill them quickly to keep your customers happy.
demoapp_notif.push_total_sales_message: Your sales have been impressive this past week, reaching {{total_sales}}. Explore what's working and keep it going! 🚀
